author: Britney Muller
title: Reddit for SMBs: A hidden SEO and engagement goldmine
content: Britney Muller explores Reddit as an SEO strategy for small and medium-sized businesses. She recommends exploring platforms like Reddit that rank above current positions in search results, to identify if target markets are active there and where real value can be provided. Muller created an AI-powered tool using Google Colab notebooks to help gather comments from specific Reddit posts, generate keyword insights, and extract broader information for any topic. She also provided a no-code option for those uncomfortable with coding, though it limits data gathering capacity. This article highlights practical AI implementation for SMBs seeking competitive SEO advantages through emerging platforms.
